message:
fix(css): Remove duplicate toast styles conflicting with components.css

Removed duplicate .toast and .toast-info definitions from styles.css that
were conflicting with the canonical definitions in components.css.

Also removed orphaned @keyframes toast-pop animation since components.css
uses its own toast-slide-in animation instead.
